name: Initial Setup
description: Install and configure Borg CLI for first use.
instructions: Install Borg CLI and run the initial setup command to configure your API credentials. Verify the installation works by running borg --version.
expected_steps: Install via: pip install borg-cli (or appropriate method)
success_criteria: borg --version returns a valid version string without errors
hints: Try 'borg init --help' to see available options
Check if BORG_API_KEY environment variable is needed

name: Search for a Pattern
description: Find existing approaches for a common debugging problem.
instructions: Search Borg for approaches related to 'null pointer exception' debugging. Find an approach and note its name.
expected_steps: Review the list of approaches returned
Select an approach and view its details
success_criteria: At least one approach is displayed with steps for handling null pointer exceptions
hints: The search syntax is: borg search <query>
Results are ranked by relevance to your query

name: Apply an Approach
description: Use an existing approach to solve a simulated problem.
instructions: Apply the 'debug-null-pointer' approach to understand how it works. Preview the steps without executing them.
expected_steps: Note what files or code patterns the approach identifies
success_criteria: Approach is loaded and diagnostic steps are displayed
hints: Try 'borg apply --list' to see available approaches
Use 'borg apply <name> --dry-run' to preview without executing

name: Custom Query
description: Ask Borg for advice on a specific technical problem.
instructions: Use the suggest command to get advice on handling rate limiting in API calls. Be specific about wanting to understand backoff strategies.
expected_steps: Run: borg suggest 'rate limiting with exponential backoff'
Read the suggested approach or strategy
Note which approach or pack was recommended
success_criteria: A relevant suggestion or approach is returned that addresses rate limiting
hints: Be specific about your use case for better results

name: Feedback Loop
description: Provide feedback on an approach to improve Borg's knowledge.
instructions: After trying an approach (or reviewing one), submit feedback about its effectiveness. Rate it and add a note.
expected_steps: Provide a rating (1-5) and optional notes
success_criteria: Feedback is recorded and acknowledged by the system
hints: Use 'borg feedback --list' to see recent approaches
Honest feedback helps improve the collective knowledge base
